publicSideBand: No direct charge during scheduled city replacement for eligible properties
privateSideBand: No direct charge during scheduled city replacement and LEAP offers deferred repayment outside the scheduled path
fullReplacementBand: Property owners may face a $6000-$10000 replacement cost if the city cannot replace under the scheduled program and no LEAP pathway is used
housingTypeAssumption: City of Columbus program page publishes both scheduled no-cost replacement and owner-cost language with a citywide estimate range
permitAssumption: Work agreement timing and program-area eligibility determine whether the city or owner bears the immediate cost
restorationAssumption: Columbus says scheduled work includes restoration of construction damage back to pre-replacement condition
methodologySummary: Columbus publishes both a local owner-cost range and a utility-specific no-cost scheduled replacement path so the page can show when the number applies and when it does not.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners pay only when the address is outside the active city replacement path or declines that schedule and then shift to LEAP or owner-managed replacement instead of the signed-work-agreement city path.
